# Elizabeth Stein

> Full-stack engineer shipping production code across three orgs. Capella B.S., Summa Cum Laude (3.98 GPA, conferred March 2026). Sole developer on CyberReady Clinic's Dynamics 365 / Power Platform assessment, live in production. Algolia Agent Studio Challenge winner, npm publisher, and MCP server author.

## About
elizabethannstein.com is the portfolio of Elizabeth Stein, a full-stack engineer specializing in Microsoft Power Platform (Dynamics 365, Dataverse), Next.js, React, TypeScript, and AI integration (Claude, MCP servers, RAG). The site presents her work as an interactive 3D "galaxy" of roughly 90 projects, with a recruiter fast-track to the strongest, verifiable proof.

## Proof
- CyberReady Clinic MSP Ready5 Assessment: sole developer on a production Dynamics 365 / Power Platform assessment, front-end externalized to a Next.js app at msp.cyberready.clinic.
- TimeSlipSearch: Algolia Agent Studio Challenge winner ($750), search over 420k records.
- Specter: published npm package, 65 CLI commands, 14 MCP tools.
- Trace: DEV.to GitHub Finish-Up-A-Thon winner. Turns a screenshot into a runnable React component using Google Gemini grounded in a shadcn catalog.
